role: NoSQL persistence adapter — AWS DynamoDB (Spring Cloud AWS 3.3.0)

packages.infra.dynamodb.adapter: Outbound adapters (*Adapter) implementing core *Port — active only on @Profile("dynamodb")

note: Activate with --spring.profiles.active=dynamodb. Cannot coexist with infra-postgres at runtime — both implement UserRepositoryPort and Spring will fail to autowire without profile isolation.
